name: Glaze Lemon Squares
recipeInstructions:
Mix the 1 cup of bisquick and powdered sugar. Add in the margarine and cut with a knife until combined.
Press into an ungreased 8-inch square pan.
Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Mix all remaining ingredients together.
Pour over slightly cooled baked layer.
Return to oven and bake another 25 minutes, or until set.
Loosen edges while warm.
Cool completely.
Spread with glaze (beat together until smooth).
